title.rendered: Railway RRB Group D Online Form 2026

acf.short_information: Railway Recruitment Boards (RRB), Has Released The Official Notification On The Official Website For The Recruitment Of Group-D (Level-1) Posts Across Various Railway Zones In India. RRB Application Form Last Date 02 March 2026. Candidates Can Apply Before Last Date. The Minimum Age Required Is 18 Years & The Maximum Age Is 33 Years As On 01 January 2026 Candidates Can Also Check All Details Of RRB Group-D Recruitment 2026. (Advt. No. CEN 09/2025)

table_header.red: Railway RRB Group D Online Form 2026 - Start

acf.important_dates:
Notification Date : 30 January 2026
Online Apply Start Date : 31 January 2026
Online Apply Last Date : 02 March 2026
Last Date For Fee Payment : 04 March 2026
Correction Date : 05 - 14 March 2026
Exam Date : Notify Later
Admit Card : Before Exam
Result Date : Will Be Updated Here Soon
Candidates are advised to confirm from the RRB official website.
acf.right_column_details:
For General, OBC, : ₹ 500/-
For SC/ ST/ EBC / Female / Transgender : ₹ 250/-
Refund Amount (On Appearing For CBT)
For General, OBC, : ₹ 400/-
For SC/ ST/ EBC / Female / Transgender : ₹ 250/-
Payment Mode (Online): You can make the payment using the following methods:
Debit Card
Credit Card
Internet Banking
IMPS
Cash Card / Mobile Wallet
acf.age_limit:
Minimum Age : 18 Years 
Maximum Age : 33 Years 
RRB provides age relaxation for the Group D Various Posts in Level 1 position as per their regulations.
acf.eligibility: Candidates who have completed Class 10 (High School) from a school recognized by NCVT/SCVT or hold a National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) issued by NCVT are eligible to apply for the RRB Group D Recruitment Exam.
acf.mode_of_selection:
Computer Based Test (CBT-1)
Physical Efficiency Test
Document Verification
Medical Examination
acf.how_to_steps:
Interested candidates who wish to apply for the RRB post can submit their application online before 02 March 2026.
Use the click here link provided below under important link section to apply directly.
Alternatively, visit the official website of RRB to complete the application process online.
Make sure to complete the application before the deadline 02 March 2026.
Note – छात्रो से ये अनुरोध किया जाता है की वो अपना फॉर्म भरने से पहले Official Notification को ध्यान से जरूर पढे उसके बाद ही अपना फॉर्म भरे । (Last Date, Age Limit, & Education Qualification)
acf.faq:
Question: When will the online application for Railway RRB Group-D (Level-1) Recruitment 2026 start?
Answer: The online application for this recruitment has started on 31 January 2026.
Question: What is the last date to apply for Railway RRB Group-D (Level-1) Recruitment 2026?
Answer: The last date to submit the online application is 02 March 2026.
Question: What is the age limit for Railway RRB Group-D (Level-1) Recruitment 2026?
Answer: 18 - 33 Years as on 01 January 2026.
Question: What is the eligibility for Railway RRB Group-D (Level-1) Recruitment 2026?
Answer: Candidates must have a Class 10th Passed in the relevant field.
Question: What is the official website for RRB?
Answer: The official website for RRB is https://indianrailways.gov.in/.

acf.short_information: Railway Recruitment Board RRB has released NTPC Recruitment 2026 notification. Candidates can check eligibility, age limit, vacancy details and apply online.

acf.faq:
Question: When will the online application for JPSC Drug Inspector Recruitment 2026 Start?
Answer: The online application for this recruitment has started on 29 January 2026.
Question: What is the last date for online application for JPSC Drug Inspector Online Form 2026?
Answer: The last date for online application Form is 18 February 2026.
Question: What is the age limit for JPSC Drug Inspector Bharti 2026?
Answer: The age limit for JPSC Drug Inspector Bharti 2026 is as follows:
The Minimum age is 21 Years & The Maximum Age Is 40 Years as on 01 August 2024.
Question: What is the eligibility for JPSC Drug Inspector Vacancy 2026?
Answer: The eligibility for JPSC Drug Inspector Bharti 2026 is as follows post wise.
Question: What is the official website for JPSC?
